privacy.title: Privacy Policy

meta.title: Privacy Policy | B2B Insight Panel
meta.description: How InsightPanel collects, uses, and protects your personal data.

privacy.intro: InsightPanel ("we," "us," "our") operates a B2B insight panel connecting survey respondents with research brands. This Privacy Policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and the choices you have.

sections.heading: 1. Information we collect
paragraphs: We collect information you provide directly (name, email, demographic profile answers) and information generated through your use of the service (survey responses, device data, IP address, and usage analytics).

sections.heading: 2. How we use your information
list: To match you with relevant, qualifying surveys
To calculate and process your rewards and payouts
To detect fraud and protect the integrity of the panel
To improve our matching algorithms and product experience

sections.heading: 3. How we share information
paragraphs: Survey responses are shared with research partners only in aggregated, anonymized form. We never sell your personal data, and we never share your name, email, or identifying details with survey sponsors without your explicit consent.

sections.heading: 4. Data retention
paragraphs: We retain account and response data for as long as your account is active, or as needed to comply with legal obligations. You may request deletion at any time via account settings or by contacting support.

sections.heading: 5. Your rights
paragraphs: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the right to access, correct, export, or delete your personal data, and to object to certain processing. We are fully GDPR and CCPA compliant.

sections.heading: 6. Security
paragraphs: We use industry-standard, bank-grade encryption both in transit and at rest, alongside regular security audits, to protect your information.

sections.heading: 7. Contact us
paragraphs: Questions about this policy? Reach us at support@b2b2insightpanel.com or via our

cookie.title: Cookie Policy

meta.title: Cookie Policy | B2B Insight Panel
meta.description: How InsightPanel uses cookies and similar technologies.

cookie.intro: This Cookie Policy explains how InsightPanel uses cookies and similar technologies when you visit our website or use our app.

sections.heading: 1. What are cookies
paragraphs: Cookies are small text files placed on your device that help us recognize you, remember preferences, and understand how you use our service.

rows: Remember language, currency, and display settings
Understand usage patterns to improve the product
Detect duplicate accounts and suspicious activity

sections.heading: 3. Managing your preferences
paragraphs: You can manage non-essential cookies at any time via our cookie banner or your browser settings. Disabling essential cookies may prevent core features (like staying signed in) from working properly.

sections.heading: 4. Third-party cookies
paragraphs: Some analytics and fraud-prevention partners may set their own cookies on our behalf. We only work with partners bound by strict data protection agreements.

sections.heading: 5. Changes to this policy
paragraphs: We'll update this page whenever our cookie practices change materially, and note the date at the top.

sections.heading: 6. Contact us
paragraphs: Questions? Reach us at support@b2b2insightpanel.com or via our

eula.title: End User License Agreement

meta.title: EULA — End User License Agreement | B2B Insight Panel
meta.description: The license terms governing your use of the InsightPanel app and website.

eula.intro: This End User License Agreement ("EULA") governs your use of the InsightPanel mobile application and website (the "App"). By installing or using the App, you agree to be bound by this EULA.

sections.heading: 1. License grant
paragraphs: We grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to install and use the App on your personal devices, solely for participating in surveys and managing your account.

sections.heading: 2. Restrictions
list: You may not reverse-engineer, decompile, or disassemble the App
You may not use bots, scripts, or automation to complete surveys
You may not create multiple accounts to farm rewards
You may not resell, sublicense, or transfer your account

sections.heading: 3. Ownership
paragraphs: The App, including all code, design, and trademarks, remains the exclusive property of InsightPanel. This EULA does not transfer any ownership rights to you.

sections.heading: 4. Updates
paragraphs: We may release updates to the App periodically. Continued use after an update constitutes acceptance of any changes to functionality.

sections.heading: 5. Termination
paragraphs: We may suspend or terminate your license immediately if you violate this EULA, including fraudulent survey activity or duplicate accounts. Any unpaid balance obtained through fraud will be forfeited.

sections.heading: 6. Disclaimer & liability
paragraphs: The App is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. To the maximum extent permitted by law, InsightPanel is not liable for indirect or consequential damages arising from your use of the App.

sections.heading: 7. Contact us
paragraphs: Questions about this agreement? Reach us via our

terms.title: Terms & Conditions

meta.title: Terms & Conditions | B2B Insight Panel
meta.description: The terms governing your access to and use of InsightPanel.

terms.intro: These Terms & Conditions ("Terms") govern your access to and use of InsightPanel. By creating an account, you agree to these Terms in full.

sections.heading: 1. Eligibility
paragraphs: You must be at least 18 years old (or the age of majority in your jurisdiction) and able to form a binding contract to use InsightPanel. One account per person is permitted.

sections.heading: 2. Account & conduct
list: You are responsible for keeping your login credentials secure
You must provide accurate profile information for survey matching
Fraudulent responses, bots, or duplicate accounts will result in suspension

sections.heading: 3. Rewards & payouts
paragraphs: Rewards are credited to your balance upon successful survey completion, as verified by our quality checks. Balances can be cashed out once you reach the $5 minimum threshold, to PayPal, bank transfer, or supported gift cards, at zero fee.

sections.heading: 4. Membership is free
paragraphs: Creating and maintaining an InsightPanel account is always free. We never charge subscription or membership fees, and we never take a cut of your rewards.

sections.heading: 5. Survey participation
paragraphs: Surveys are provided by third-party research brands via our platform. We do our best to ensure accurate reward and time estimates, but exact qualification is determined by each survey's screening logic.

sections.heading: 6. Termination
paragraphs: We may suspend or close accounts that violate these Terms, including fraud, abuse, or multiple accounts. You may close your account at any time from account settings.

sections.heading: 7. Limitation of liability
paragraphs: InsightPanel is provided "as is." We are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service, to the maximum extent permitted by law.

sections.heading: 8. Changes to these terms
paragraphs: We may update these Terms from time to time. Material changes will be communicated via email or in-app notice before taking effect.

sections.heading: 9. Contact us
paragraphs: Questions about these Terms? Reach us via our
